allow: Bash(ls ~/Documents/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i miguel; ls /Applications/ | grep -i obsidian; echo "---"; ls ~/Documents/MiguelVault 2>/dev/null && echo "Vault existe" || echo "Vault NO existe")

Bash(timeout 5 curl -v -N -H 'Authorization: Bearer 27afd7b93f2d117b3cff10d13e9f6439b6bead343b2a2e1cfe0459956e9c98f2' -H 'Accept: text/event-stream' -H 'Cache-Control: no-cache' http://127.0.0.1:27123/mcp)

Bash(curl -s -m 5 -H "Authorization: Bearer 27afd7b93f2d117b3cff10d13e9f6439b6bead343b2a2e1cfe0459956e9c98f2" -H "Accept: application/json" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -X POST http://127.0.0.1:27123/mcp -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}')
